wordplay_note: A man of the mud — corrupt and earthbound
card_description: Arnie Kott (meaning "Kott = mud/filth (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Corrupt union boss on Mars who tries to exploit Manfred's temporal abilities. Name note: A man of the mud — corrupt and earthbound. Power and greed attempting to harness visionary consciousness for profit. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Corrupt union boss on Mars who tries to exploit Manfred's temporal abilities
reference.significance: Power and greed attempting to harness visionary consciousness for profit
